[Task trader-board-001] PHASE 3b: IMPLEMENT
Title: Add tests for TraderLeaderboard component

Read your plan at .fleet/tasks/trader-board-001/plan.json.

YOU MUST IMPLEMENT the plan completely. This is the critical execution phase.

For EACH step in plan.json, you MUST:
1. Announce: "=== Step N: {task description} ==="
2. Execute the step — create/modify the actual source files
3. Verify it worked (check file exists, run code, test passes)
4. Announce: "=== Step N complete ===" before moving to next

DO NOT STOP until ALL steps are executed and verified.
DO NOT just read the plan — you must CREATE the files it specifies.

DEPENDENCIES: Fresh worktree — install before testing:
  - Node: pnpm install or npm install
  - Python: pip install -r requirements.txt

After all steps are complete, write .fleet/tasks/trader-board-001/implementation.json:
{
  "phase": "implement",
  "steps_completed": [
    { "step": 1, "task": "...", "files_created": ["..."], "files_modified": ["..."], "verified": true }
  ],
  "all_steps_done": true
}

BEFORE YOU STOP: git add -A && git commit --no-verify -m "execute: trader-board-001"
